title: Mixae
description: Mixae adds fun and unique weapons and items to minecraft
body:
# About

Mixae adds fun and unique weapons and items to minecraft. They are handcrafted to not overshadow other items but to provide a fun alternative.


# Features:
- Vithylium: an ethereal crystalline material with an affinity for gold.
- Scythes (gold and vithylium): large area of effect melee weapon trading speed and damage for wide hits and a long range
- Daggers (gold and vithylium): fast melee weapon with the ability to hit many times in a quick succession
- Falling Blossom: unique staff summoning falling petals from the stars in a large area


# Thank you
I make mods as a hobby and I'm excited to polish and expand on them. Stay tuned as I have much more content planned, all better than the previous!  
I am working on setting up a discord server to receive feedbacks and give updates as I work on my projects.  
Thank you for viewing my mods <3
